captures.alignment: same square orthographic camera direction and 1.45 framing scale

interpretation: The browser derives clearcoat F0 from Blender's authored 1.59000015 coat IOR and uses a measured 0.62 light scale for this large isolated asset. Relative to the uncalibrated coat-IOR capture, pixel MAE improves from 0.0622 to 0.0439, macro MAE from 0.0536 to 0.0403, macro correlation from 0.8494 to 0.8630, and mean luminance error from +0.0509 to +0.0015. A dedicated Blender diagnostic shows the Bevel For Eevee normal-mix factor is saturated near white on this surface, leaving high-frequency procedural filtering as the dominant residual.
